---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution or approach.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you've thought about and why they were ruled out.

## Affected Components

Which parts of the platform are involved?

- [ ] `apps/web` — Dashboard
- [ ] `apps/engine` — Quant engine
- [ ] `apps/agents` — Agent orchestrator
- [ ] `packages/shared` — Shared contracts
- [ ] `supabase/` — Database / migrations
- [ ] `.github/` — CI / workflows

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, references, or architectural notes here.
